# Ideal Customer Profile

_Keep ICPs practical for targeting and prioritization. Prefer concrete qualifiers over generic traits._

## Firmographic profile
_Define the account attributes that make a customer a strong fit (size, industry, geography, stack)._
## Core pains and desired outcomes
_Summarize repeatable pains and the outcomes customers are actively trying to achieve._
## Qualification criteria
_List objective "must-have" and "strong-fit" criteria for sales/discovery._
## Exclusion criteria
_List anti-signals that indicate low fit, poor economics, or high churn risk._
